cross_scene_arcs.title: Fight for Survival Against Poison
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev Chelios fights to stay alive after being poisoned with the Beijing Cocktail, which blocks adrenal function; he sustains himself through constant adrenaline via movement, self-harm, and stimulants, ultimately surviving extreme physical trauma.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: alive but unconscious after surviving a fatal fall and cardiac arrest
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: long-term survival and recovery remain uncertain despite continued heartbeat

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation of Vengeance Against Verona
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev transitions from survival mode to active vengeance against Ricky Verona, culminating in a midair confrontation where he kills Verona before falling from a helicopter.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: declared enemy of Verona after receiving taunting death message
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona is dead, killed by Chev during free fall
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Verona's possible accomplices or legacy remain unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Dependence on Adrenaline and Self-Sustained Stimulation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev must maintain elevated adrenaline levels to counteract the Beijing Cocktail’s suppression of adrenal function, resorting to stimulants, violence, medical intervention, and self-inflicted pain to stay alive.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: adrenal function blocked, requiring external adrenaline stimulation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: reliance on extreme measures to sustain heart function, including self-shock and burning
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: no long-term solution exists; survival is temporary and physically unsustainable

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Trust and Emotional Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chev experiences growing emotional isolation as key figures—Eve, Carlito—fail to support him, leaving him to face his crisis alone despite prior loyalty and personal connections.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally dependent on Eve, loyal to hierarchy under Carlito
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: abandoned by Eve and denied help by Carlito, acting in complete isolation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: emotional reconciliation or support remains absent even after survival

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deterioration of Trust in Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's relationship with Chev shifts from affectionate intimacy to emotional rupture as his secrecy and aggression erode trust.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: close and familiar bond with Chev
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: views Chev as a physical threat and source of fear
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about Chev's true identity and intentions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trauma and Re-engagement in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After being assaulted and abandoned, Eve re-enters Chev's violent world, shifting from victim to active participant in survival under extreme duress.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: physically and emotionally involved in Chev's survival during life-threatening confrontations
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: motivation behind her return and continued involvement

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Vulnerability and Fleeting Connection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve seeks emotional security from Chev, expressing openness and requesting a promise, revealing a desire for stability amid chaos.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: at ease in domestic setting with Chev
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: fear of future loss and lack of lasting commitment

cross_scene_arcs.title: Witness to Physical and Psychological Extremes
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve is repeatedly exposed to Chev's physical deterioration and violent behavior, progressing from observer to participant in his crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: exposed to extreme bodily trauma and active in high-risk survival behavior
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: inability to process the extent of Chev's suffering and her role in it

cross_scene_arcs.title: Poison and Power: Verona's Psychological Warfare
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona initiates and escalates psychological and physical conflict against Chev by poisoning him, revealing alliances, and taunting his vulnerability, only to be destabilized when Chev survives and mocks the attack.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona in control, taunting an unconscious Chev with a fatal poison.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona shaken and unable to respond as Chev demands more of the poison.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Verona's strategy fails, leaving him without a clear path to eliminate Chev.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Brother's Shadow: Grief and Retribution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona's emotional connection to his brother Alex surfaces through rage, grief, and performative resolve, escalating the personal stakes of the conflict after Chev reveals knowledge of Alex's death and possession of his belongings.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona learns Chev has his brother's phone, triggering silent fury.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona commits to retaliation after seeing Alex's severed hand, masking inner turmoil with outward calm.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Verona's grief remains unprocessed, driving him toward reckless confrontation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fall from Dominance: Physical and Symbolic Loss
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona's authority erodes as he loses control of personal symbols (the medallion) and physical capability (his fingers), shifting from a composed enforcer to a wounded, scrambling survivor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona reveals the medallion's significance, then realizes he has exposed a vulnerability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona crawls through chaos, collecting severed fingers and arming himself with a syringe.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His ability to function as a threat is compromised by injury and loss of status.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Final Confrontation: Escalation to Death
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Verona makes a final attempt to dominate Chev by hijacking a helicopter and injecting him, but is overpowered and killed midair in a decisive physical confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Verona gains control of the helicopter and injects Chev.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Verona is strangled by Chev and dies during the fall.
